name: @lesto/live-protocol
description: Lesto local-first sync (ADR 0042 Tier 4) — the pure, runtime-agnostic contract both the client store and the server shape engine bind to: the shape descriptor + its stable id, the per-row predicate + total-order semantics, and the row-data SSE frame codec. Carries auth-scoped ROW DATA (unlike @lesto/realtime's topic wire).
